skills.name: Jolly Roger
skills.description: Place a flag that raises the combat abilities of the pirate crew. A combo is activated if multiple enemies are defeated near the Jolly Roger. Achieving a combo of 100 activates a fever buff that increases final damage. (Final efficiency decreases if the basic magic attack of the caster is lower than the basic attack of the target.)
skills.effect_text:
Flag Duration: 30 seconds
Final Damage: + CaptionRatio %
Fever Duration: CaptionTime seconds

skills.name: Dust Devil
skills.description: As you spin, attack an enemy repeatedly. The enemy will be immobilized temporarily.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x3
AoE Attack Ratio: + SkillSR
Critical rate increased by 2x when used on bleeding enemies.

skills.name: Hexen Dropper
skills.description: Attack an enemy repeatedly using a weapon in each hand.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 7
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR

skills.name: Quick and Dead
skills.description: Repeatedly shoot your pistol at enemies in front of you to deal damage. Quick and Dead attacks gain a 15% chance to land as critical attacks.

skills.name: Impale Dagger
skills.description: Move to the enemy and deal damage all around with your dagger.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 3
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR

attributes.name: Keel Hauling: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Keel Hauling] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Pillaging: Duration
attributes.description: * Increases duration of [Pillaging] by 1 second per attribute level

attributes.name: Dust Devil: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Dust Devil] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Hexen Dropper: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Hexen Dropper] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Quick and Dead: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Quick and Dead] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Quick and Dead: Ricochet
attributes.description: * 10% chance for [Quick and Dead] to ricochet on enemies within a range of 50 from the player

attributes.name: Shout
attributes.description:
* [Shout] buff which can be stacked up to 5 applies with a chance of 50% when Corsair skill is used

* Decreases stamina consumption by 10% per stack of [Shout] buff, increases Movement Speed by 1

* [Shout] buff lasts for 20 seconds

attributes.name: Impale Dagger: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Impale Dagger] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Jolly Roger: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases [Jolly Roger]'s final damage increasing effects by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Jolly Roger: Support Shot
attributes.description:
Damage enemies by falling bombardment around the location where the flag is installed when entering the Fever state of [Jolly Roger]

Damage circle 75 range every 0.5 seconds for 5 seconds

- Factor: 50% of [Hexen Dropper] factor including the number of hits

attributes.name: [Arts] Keel Hauling: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Keel Hauling] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Dust Devil: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Dust Devil] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Hexen Dropper: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Hexen Dropper] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Quick and Dead: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Quick and Dead] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Impale Dagger: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Impale Dagger] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Corsair: Lucky Coin
attributes.description:
* Apply [Lucky Coin] buff by 77% when using attack skill among Fever

* Applies [Lucky] buff that increases AoE Attack Ratio of nearby party members by 50% of your AoE Attack Ratio for 60 seconds when the buff ends with 7 stacks of [Lucky coin]

* AoE Attack Ratio cannot exceed over 15

* AoE Ratio does not get over 30 when the AoE Attack Ratio of party member exceeds 30 by the [Lucky] buff

AoE Attack Ratio of the caster does not increase.
